c4825298-dab6-401b-a5b8-e67e48037b22.name: Call Summary
c4825298-dab6-401b-a5b8-e67e48037b22.result: Salaheddine, a 27-year-old electrician based in Sydney with 7 years of experience at Mistralicity and previously Elevenlicity, is seeking new opportunities due to feeling underpaid at his current salary of $100,000, targeting a range of $135,000–$165,000. He shared an example of managing and training a team member under pressure, highlighting his leadership and adaptability, and noted his multilingual skills (Spanish and Portuguese) as a unique asset for team cohesion on diverse job sites. The call concluded with confirmation that the recruiter will search for roles matching his experience and salary expectations.
